# Extracao: Promoting Other Peoples Launches

- **Tipo:** TXT

﻿PROMOTING OTHER PEOPLE'S LAUNCHES

Welcome to the Promoting Other People’s Launches Bonus. This is about how to promote other people’s launches as an Affiliate or JV Partner.

1 Introduction [13 minutes]
This lesson will introduce you to why you might want to promote other people's launches.

2 Strategy & Key Considerations [14 minutes]
In this lesson you'll learn about some of the strategy that goes into effectively promoting for others, and some key considerations.

3 Three Ways to Drive Traffic [15 minutes]
This lesson is about three ways to drive traffic during a launch.

4 Deep Dive: Promoting PLF [27 minutes]
In this lesson, Jeff shows you how his partners promote PLF to scale their businesses, and invites you to become an affiliate.

5 Using Bonuses to Boost Sales [23 minutes]
In this lesson you'll learn how to use bonuses to move the needle when you're promoting for other people's launches.
